source_description: Post-merge audit follow-ups for M-006 (entity-storage-translations-v1, squash 0f7e1809a). #1445 (HIGH): TranslationController has no access gate. #1446 (MEDIUM): --default-langcode + --add-translations CLI args interpolated into generated PHP without regex validation. #1447 (MEDIUM): fieldLangcode() ships only on TranslatableEntityTrait, not declared on TranslatableInterface. Mission must land before any consumer flips an entity type to translatable: true.
